meta.note: Public-domain U.S. federal facility data plus AI/human-summarized public web info, company-level ONLY. No personal data or individual names. Hand-built seed sample proving the schema; the app generates entries like these in bulk on the user's machine. Unverified — confirm before relying on any entry.

labs.name: Baylor Genetics
labs.profile:
Summary: Clinical genomics laboratory in Houston's Texas Medical Center; a joint venture of H.U. Group Holdings and Baylor College of Medicine's Department of Molecular and Human Genetics [1].

Services / testing focus:
- Whole genome and whole exome sequencing plus focused panels [1]
- 3,000+ tests offered; 100,000+ tests performed per year [1]
- Family planning, prenatal, neonatal/pediatric, oncology, and pharmacogenomics [1]

Scope & signals:
- Serves clients in 50 states and 16 countries [1]
- Awarded a multi-year national U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs contract for pharmacogenomic and germline/hereditary-cancer testing [2]

Sources:
[1] https://www.baylorgenetics.com
[2] https://www.tmc.edu/press-releases/baylor-genetics-launches-pharmacogenomic-and-germline-genetic-testing-for-the-u-s-department-of-veterans-affairs/

labs.name: Castle Biosciences, Inc.
labs.profile:
Summary: Molecular diagnostics company (founded 2008), corporate headquarters in Friendswood, TX; develops prognostic and diagnostic tests to guide patient care [1].

Services / testing focus:
- Molecular prognostic/diagnostic tests focused on dermatologic and gastroenterological disease — skin, eye, and gastrointestinal cancers [1]

Scope & signals:
- HQ at 1500 West Parkwood Avenue, Friendswood, TX; laboratory facilities in Phoenix, AZ and Pittsburgh, PA [1]
- New corporate headquarters grand opening in March 2026 [2]
- Publicly traded (Nasdaq: CSTL) [1]

Sources:
[1] https://ir.castlebiosciences.com/company-info
[2] https://communityimpact.com/houston/pearland-friendswood-manvel/health-care/2026/03/23/castle-biosciences-to-hold-grand-opening-in-friendswood/

labs.name: Luminex Corporation
labs.profile:
Summary: Austin, TX biotechnology company (founded 1995), a DiaSorin company; develops and manufactures multiplexed biological testing technologies [1].

Services / testing focus:
- xMAP multiplexing bead technology enabling simultaneous analysis of many bioassays [1]
- Applications across clinical diagnostics, pharmaceutical drug discovery, biomedical research, flow cytometry, genomic/proteomic research, and food safety [1]

Scope & signals:
- Based at 12212 Technology Blvd, Austin, TX; roughly 745 employees [1]
- FDA-registered IVD manufacturer profile (SEC filings) [2]

Sources:
[1] https://www.bionity.com/en/companies/20719/luminex-corporation.html
[2] https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1033905/000095014406002405/g00174e10vk.htm
